'''Ahk'laht''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]], assigned to protect [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in her duties as ambassador.

During negotiations between Leia and a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] ambassador over access to the [[Alater-ka]] spaceport, Ahk'laht feared that in the Barabel's effort to intimidate Lady Vader, he might strike her. He subsequently took action and rendered the ambassador unconscious.

Already under pressure from [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and other [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representatives—including an [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] representative who called Leia a "[[Slavery/Legends|slaver]]"—to cut her ties with the Noghri, this incident finally convinced Leia to send the Noghri home. She instructed Ahk'laht to contact the clan dynasts on [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] and report that he and his comrades were returning home.
